issue.message: `@layout/widget_taxeca` includes views not allowed in a `RemoteView`: View
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 24)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

Composable functions that return Unit should start with an uppercase letter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_gst_body`; missing conversion character in '`% a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_gst_body">Taxe fédérale de 5 % applicable à la plupart des biens et services dans toutes les provinces et territoires canadiens.</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_gst_body`; missing conversion character in '`% a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_gst_body">Federal tax of 5% applied on most goods and services across all Canadian provinces and territories.</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_gst_body`; missing conversion character in '`% a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_gst_body">Federal tax of 5% applied on most goods and services across all Canadian provinces and territories.</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_qst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, c`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_qst_body">Taxe provinciale québécoise de 9,975 %, calculée sur le montant de base avant taxes (non composée sur la TPS).</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_qst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, c`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_qst_body">Quebec\'s provincial tax of 9.975%, calculated on the pre-tax base amount (not compounded on GST).</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_qst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, c`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_qst_body">Quebec\'s provincial tax of 9.975%, calculated on the pre-tax base amount (not compounded on GST).</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_rst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_rst_body">Taxe provinciale de vente au détail du Manitoba de 7 %, appliquée sur le montant de base avant TPS.</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_rst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_rst_body">Manitoba\'s provincial retail sales tax of 7%, applied on the base amount before GST.</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `tooltip_rst_body`; missing conversion character in '`%, a`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="tooltip_rst_body">Manitoba\'s provincial retail sales tax of 7%, applied on the base amount before GST.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("calculations"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="history_hidden_nudge">%1$d calculations saved — upgrade to see them all</string>

issue.message: The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.

String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Hardcoded string "TaxeCA 🍁", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Québec", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "$100.00", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "GST (5%)", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "$5.00", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "QST (9.975%)", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "$9.98", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Total TTC", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "$114.98", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Ouvrir", should use `@string` resource
